root_text.an5.157:1.1: “Pañcannaṁ, bhikkhave, puggalānaṁ kathā dukkathā puggale puggalaṁ upanidhāya.
root_text.an5.157:2.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, assaddhassa saddhākathā dukkathā?
root_text.an5.157:2.2: Assaddho, bhikkhave, saddhākathāya kacchamānāya abhisajjati kuppati byāpajjati patitthīyati kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:2.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, saddhāsampadaṁ attani na samanupassati, na ca labhati tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:3.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, dussīlassa sīlakathā dukkathā?
root_text.an5.157:3.2: Dussīlo, bhikkhave, sīlakathāya kacchamānāya abhisajjati kuppati byāpajjati patitthīyati kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:3.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, sīlasampadaṁ attani na samanupassati na ca labhati tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:4.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, appassutassa bāhusaccakathā dukkathā?
root_text.an5.157:4.2: Appassuto, bhikkhave, bāhusaccakathāya kacchamānāya abhisajjati kuppati byāpajjati patitthīyati kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:4.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, sutasampadaṁ attani na samanupassati, na ca labhati tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:5.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, maccharissa cāgakathā dukkathā?
root_text.an5.157:5.2: Maccharī, bhikkhave, cāgakathāya kacchamānāya abhisajjati kuppati byāpajjati patitthīyati kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:5.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, cāgasampadaṁ attani na samanupassati na ca labhati tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:6.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, duppaññassa paññākathā dukkathā?
root_text.an5.157:6.2: Duppañño, bhikkhave, paññākathāya kacchamānāya abhisajjati kuppati byāpajjati patitthīyati kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:6.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, paññāsampadaṁ attani na samanupassati, na ca labhati tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:6.6: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ puggalānaṁ kathā dukkathā puggale puggalaṁ upanidhāya.
root_text.an5.157:7.1: Pañcannaṁ, bhikkhave, puggalānaṁ kathā sukathā puggale puggalaṁ upanidhāya.
root_text.an5.157:8.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, saddhassa saddhākathā sukathā?
root_text.an5.157:8.2: Saddho, bhikkhave, saddhākathāya kacchamānāya nābhisajjati na kuppati na byāpajjati na patitthīyati na kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:8.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, saddhāsampadaṁ attani samanupassati labhati ca tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:9.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, sīlavato sīlakathā sukathā?
root_text.an5.157:9.2: Sīlavā, bhikkhave, sīlakathāya kacchamānāya nābhisajjati na kuppati na byāpajjati na patitthīyati na kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:9.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, sīlasampadaṁ attani samanupassati, labhati ca tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:10.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, bahussutassa bāhusaccakathā sukathā?
root_text.an5.157:10.2: Bahussuto, bhikkhave, bāhusaccakathāya kacchamānāya nābhisajjati na kuppati na byāpajjati na patitthīyati na kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:10.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, sutasampadaṁ attani samanupassati, labhati ca tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:11.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, cāgavato cāgakathā sukathā?
root_text.an5.157:11.2: Cāgavā, bhikkhave, cāgakathāya kacchamānāya nābhisajjati na kuppati na byāpajjati na patitthīyati na kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:11.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, cāgasampadaṁ attani samanupassati, labhati ca tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:12.1: Kasmā ca, bhikkhave, paññavato paññākathā sukathā?
root_text.an5.157:12.2: Paññavā, bhikkhave, paññākathāya kacchamānāya nābhisajjati na kuppati na byāpajjati na patitthīyati na kopañca dosañca appaccayañca pātukaroti.
root_text.an5.157:12.4: Tañhi so, bhikkhave, paññāsampadaṁ attani samanupassati labhati ca tatonidānaṁ pītipāmojjaṁ.
root_text.an5.157:12.6: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ puggalānaṁ kathā sukathā puggale puggalaṁ upanidhāyā”ti.

translation_text.an5.157:1.1: “Mendicants, it is inappropriate to speak to five individuals by comparing that individual with someone else.
translation_text.an5.157:1.3: It’s inappropriate to talk to an unfaithful person about faith.
translation_text.an5.157:1.4: It’s inappropriate to talk to an unethical person about ethics.
translation_text.an5.157:1.5: It’s inappropriate to talk to an unlearned person about learning.
translation_text.an5.157:1.6: It’s inappropriate to talk to a stingy person about generosity.
translation_text.an5.157:1.7: It’s inappropriate to talk to a witless person about wisdom.
translation_text.an5.157:2.1: And why is it inappropriate to talk to an unfaithful person about faith?
translation_text.an5.157:2.2: When an unfaithful person is spoken to about faith they lose their temper, becoming annoyed, hostile, and hard-hearted, and displaying annoyance, hate, and bitterness.
translation_text.an5.157:2.4: Not seeing that faith in themselves, they don’t get the rapture and joy that faith brings.
translation_text.an5.157:2.5: That’s why it’s inappropriate to talk to an unfaithful person about faith.
translation_text.an5.157:3.1: And why is it inappropriate to talk to an unethical person about ethics?
translation_text.an5.157:3.2: When an unethical person is spoken to about ethics they lose their temper …
translation_text.an5.157:3.4: Not seeing that ethical conduct in themselves, they don’t get the rapture and joy that ethical conduct brings.
translation_text.an5.157:3.5: That’s why it’s inappropriate to talk to an unethical person about ethics.
translation_text.an5.157:4.1: And why is it inappropriate to talk to an unlearned person about learning?
translation_text.an5.157:4.2: When an unlearned person is spoken to about learning they lose their temper …
translation_text.an5.157:4.4: Not seeing that learning in themselves, they don’t get the rapture and joy that learning brings.
translation_text.an5.157:4.5: That’s why it’s inappropriate to talk to an unlearned person about learning.
translation_text.an5.157:5.1: And why is it inappropriate to talk to a stingy person about generosity?
translation_text.an5.157:5.2: When a stingy person is spoken to about generosity they lose their temper …
translation_text.an5.157:5.4: Not seeing that generosity in themselves, they don’t get the rapture and joy that generosity brings.
translation_text.an5.157:5.5: That’s why it’s inappropriate to talk to a stingy person about generosity.
translation_text.an5.157:6.1: And why is it inappropriate to talk to a witless person about wisdom?
translation_text.an5.157:6.2: When a witless person is spoken to about wisdom they lose their temper, becoming annoyed, hostile, and hard-hearted, and displaying annoyance, hate, and bitterness.
translation_text.an5.157:6.4: Not seeing that wisdom in themselves, they don’t get the rapture and joy that wisdom brings.
translation_text.an5.157:6.5: That’s why it’s inappropriate to talk to a witless person about wisdom.
translation_text.an5.157:6.6: It is inappropriate to speak to these five individuals by comparing that individual with someone else.
translation_text.an5.157:7.1: It is appropriate to speak to five individuals by comparing that individual with someone else.
translation_text.an5.157:7.3: It’s appropriate to talk to a faithful person about faith.
translation_text.an5.157:7.4: It’s appropriate to talk to an ethical person about ethical conduct.
translation_text.an5.157:7.5: It’s appropriate to talk to a learned person about learning.
translation_text.an5.157:7.6: It’s appropriate to talk to a generous person about generosity.
translation_text.an5.157:7.7: It’s appropriate to talk to a wise person about wisdom.
translation_text.an5.157:8.1: And why is it appropriate to talk to a faithful person about faith?
translation_text.an5.157:8.2: When a faithful person is spoken to about faith they don’t lose their temper, they don’t get annoyed, hostile, and hard-hearted, or display annoyance, hate, and bitterness.
translation_text.an5.157:8.4: Seeing that faith in themselves, they get the rapture and joy that faith brings.
translation_text.an5.157:8.5: That’s why it’s appropriate to talk to a faithful person about faith.
translation_text.an5.157:9.1: And why is it appropriate to talk to an ethical person about ethical conduct?
translation_text.an5.157:9.2: When an ethical person is spoken to about ethical conduct they don’t lose their temper …
translation_text.an5.157:9.4: Seeing that ethical conduct in themselves, they get the rapture and joy that ethical conduct brings.
translation_text.an5.157:9.5: That’s why it’s appropriate to talk to an ethical person about ethical conduct.
translation_text.an5.157:10.1: And why is it appropriate to talk to a learned person about learning?
translation_text.an5.157:10.2: When a learned person is spoken to about learning they don’t lose their temper …
translation_text.an5.157:10.4: Seeing that learning in themselves, they get the rapture and joy that learning brings.
translation_text.an5.157:10.5: That’s why it’s appropriate to talk to a learned person about learning.
translation_text.an5.157:11.1: And why is it appropriate to talk to a generous person about generosity?
translation_text.an5.157:11.2: When a generous person is spoken to about generosity they don’t lose their temper …
translation_text.an5.157:11.4: Seeing that generosity in themselves, they get the rapture and joy that generosity brings.
translation_text.an5.157:11.5: That’s why it’s appropriate to talk to a generous person about generosity.
translation_text.an5.157:12.1: And why is it appropriate to talk to a wise person about wisdom?
translation_text.an5.157:12.2: When a wise person is spoken to about wisdom they don’t lose their temper, they don’t get annoyed, hostile, and hard-hearted, or display annoyance, hate, and bitterness.
translation_text.an5.157:12.4: Seeing that wisdom in themselves, they get the rapture and joy that wisdom brings.
translation_text.an5.157:12.5: That’s why it’s appropriate to talk to a wise person about wisdom.
translation_text.an5.157:12.6: It is appropriate to speak to these five individuals by comparing that individual with someone else.”
